pageHeader.title: Newsletter
pageHeader.subtitle: Mahabharata Scholarship Delivered to Your Inbox
pageHeader.description: Subscribe to receive regular updates on new research, articles, podcast episodes, speaking engagements, and exclusive content from Varun Gupta.

signupCta.title: Join the Mahabharata Scholars Circle
signupCta.description: Get monthly updates on publications, upcoming events, curated reading recommendations, and behind-the-scenes insights into Mahabharata research.
signupCta.successMessage: Thank you for subscribing! Please check your inbox to confirm.

benefits.title: Exclusive Research Previews
benefits.description: Early access to draft papers, book excerpts, and upcoming publication announcements before they are publicly released.

benefits.title: Curated Reading Lists
benefits.description: Monthly recommendations of essential Mahabharata scholarship, rare manuscripts, and noteworthy publications from around the world.

benefits.title: Event Invitations
benefits.description: Priority registration for lectures, workshops, and live Q&A sessions with Varun Gupta.

benefits.title: Community Access
benefits.description: Join a growing community of Mahabharata enthusiasts and scholars for discussions and knowledge exchange.

recentIssues.title: March 2025: Women of the Mahabharata
recentIssues.excerpt: This month explores the women of the Mahabharata — new research perspectives, recommended readings, and an exclusive excerpt from the upcoming book.

recentIssues.title: February 2025: The Geography of the Epic
recentIssues.excerpt: Tracing the rivers, mountains, and kingdoms of the Mahabharata. Plus, a review of recent archaeological findings and a podcast episode highlight.

recentIssues.title: January 2025: New Year, New Research
recentIssues.excerpt: Kicking off the year with exciting research announcements, upcoming course launches, and reflections on the state of Mahabharata studies.

seo.title: Newsletter | Varun Gupta on Mahabharata
seo.description: Subscribe to Varun Gupta's newsletter for monthly updates on Mahabharata research, publications, podcast episodes, and exclusive scholarly content.
